************************************************************************
* auCdl Netlist:
*
* Library Name:  AnalogAgent_ResAmp
* Top Cell Name: NC_RA_TOP_10b_500MS
* View Name:     schematic
* ======================================================================
* [Design Agent Framework]
* Generated by:  AnalogAgent MAS (Multi-Agent System)
*                Agent-1 Code Generator   : Circuit topology + sizing
*                Agent-2 Design Optimizer : Simulation-driven diagnosis
*                Agent-3 Knowledge Curator: Rule distillation -> SEM
* Self-Evolving Memory (SEM) playbook rules applied:
*   R1  NMOS bulk must tie to VSS; PMOS bulk must tie to VDD_ANA
*   R2  Virtual ground (VG) RP must be minimized: use thick M11 routing
*   R3  NC switch RON << 1/(2*pi*BWCL*CN); verify via DC op check
*   R4  All MOSFET instances require unique identifiers (DRC)
*   R5  Subcircuit pin ordering: VDD, VSS, analog ports, clocks
*   R6  Floating nodes prohibited: every node must have a DC path
*   R7  BWCL > 1.2 GHz verified by step-response corner (0-80 C)
*   R8  GAA CP term added at VG node (TCAD-calibrated 100 fF extra)
* ======================================================================
* [Paper References]
* Ref-1 (Design Flow):
*   Bao et al., "AnalogAgent: Self-Improving Analog Circuit Design
*   Automation with LLM Agents", arXiv:2603.23910, Mar 2026.
*   -> Generate-Execute-Diagnose-Refine closed loop; SEM playbook
*   -> Pass@1 = 97.4% (GPT-5); context attrition mitigation via SEM
*
* Ref-2 (Circuit Topology):
*   Kwon et al., "A 10-Bit 500-MS/s Pipelined SAR ADC With Feedback
*   Factor Compensation in 6-nm FinFET",
*   IEEE TCSII Vol.72 No.5, May 2025.
*   -> Beta compensation: beta 0.059 -> 0.24  (k=0.8, CN=295 fF)
*   -> Single-stage inverter OTA: AOL>=48dB, fu>=4.9GHz (w/ NC)
*   -> GS=16x settled in 700 ps; SNDR=53.6dB; FoMW=13.8fJ/conv-step
*
* Ref-3 (Device Physics):
*   Zhang et al., "Hybrid Integration of GAA Stacked Si NSFET and
*   Si/SiGe Super-Lattice FinFET to Optimize 6T-SRAM for N3 Node",
*   IEEE TED Vol.71 No.3, Mar 2024.
*   -> GAA parasitic: larger CP in 3D channel (TCAD calibrated)
*   -> SL-FinFET: p-type +29.4% Ion vs NSFET (110-channel, SiGe)
*   -> Stability: DIBL/SS degradation factored into sizing margin
*   -> CP model: TCAD drift-diffusion + quantum + Piezo model
* ======================================================================
* Technology:    6-nm FinFET CMOS (HP flavor, GAA-aware parasitics)
* VDD_DIG:       0.9V  (digital SAR logic + FVF regulator input)
* VDD_ANA:       0.78V (FVF regulated: OTA + CDAC + VREFP)
* Resolution:    10-bit
* Sample Rate:   500 MS/s
* Architecture:  NC-assisted Residue Amplifier (RA) standalone cell
*   Stage Gain:  GS = 16x  (CF=16.75fF, CS=268fF)
*   Beta bare:   0.059  ->  Beta w/ NC: 0.24  (4.07x relaxation)
*   NC value:    -295 fF  (k=0.8, compensates CP~100fF + CS + CF)
*   OTA type:    Single-stage inverter-based (Fig.6 of Ref-2)
*   OTA spec:    AOL >= 48 dB,  fu >= 4.9 GHz  (NC-relaxed)
*   BWCL:        > 1.2 GHz  (settled within 700 ps window)
*   AL w/ NC:    37.5 dB  (loop gain, vs 25.4 dB w/o NC)
*   Gm target:   8 mS  (3.3x reduction from 26.2 mS bare)
*   RA power:    0.55 mW  (NC circuit: 0.23 mW, total: 0.78 mW)
* Date:          2026-06-03
************************************************************************

* ======================================================================
* AnalogAgent SEM: Adaptive Design Playbook (retrieved rules)
* ======================================================================
* [General Rules - from SEM playbook]
* G1: Define VDD_ANA and VDD_DIG explicitly via .PARAM
* G2: NMOS bulk=VSS, PMOS bulk=VDD_ANA; enforce D,G,S,B ordering
* G3: All nodes must have DC path (no floating mid-circuit nodes)
* G4: Unique instance names: MM_ prefix for MOSFET, CC_ for cap, RR_ resist
* G5: M= for array multiplication; NFIN= for fin count annotation
* [Task-Type Rules: Residue Amplifier + NC]
* T1: Virtual ground RP minimize: use M11 thick metal (SEM Rule R2)
* T2: NC switch must be OFF during sampling to prevent charge injection
* T3: Inverter OTA: PMOS W = 2x NMOS W for complementary Gm match
* T4: GAA CP at VG = 100fF extra vs FinFET estimate (SEM Rule R8)
* T5: CMFB via resistive CM sense; bypass cap 15fF at VCM node
* [Failure Rules - distilled from optimizer diagnoses]
* F1: If Vout rail-stuck -> check CMFB path; verify tail bias exists
* F2: If gain < 16x -> NC switch not activating; verify PHI_NC timing
* F3: If BWCL too low -> increase OTA W (more fins); check CL routing
* F4: If NC unstable -> reduce CN or increase k margin; check pNC pole
* ======================================================================

* ======================================================================
* Global process parameters  (6-nm FinFET HP + GAA parasitics)
* ======================================================================
.PARAM
+ VDD_ANA=0.78
+ VDD_DIG=0.9
+ VCM=0.39
+ VREFP=0.78
+ VREFN=0.0
+ FS=500MEG
+ T_SETTLE=700P
+ CU1=8.375F
+ CF_VAL='2*CU1'
+ CS_TOTAL=268F
+ GS_TARGET=16
+ NC_CN=147.5F
+ NC_TOTAL='2*NC_CN'
+ CP_VG_FINFET=100F
+ CP_VG_GAA='CP_VG_FINFET*1.3'
+ K_NC=0.8
+ BETA_BARE=0.059
+ BETA_NC=0.24
+ RELAX_FACTOR=4.07
+ AOL_BARE_MIN=60
+ AOL_NC_MIN=48
+ FU_BARE_MIN=20.6G
+ FU_NC_MIN=4.9G
+ AL_NC=37.5
+ BWCL_MIN=1.2G
+ GM_TARGET=8M
+ NFIN_MIN=2
+ WFIN=6N
+ HFIN=52N
+ WEFF_UNIT='2*HFIN+WFIN'
+ LPOLY_MIN=6N
+ LPOLY_AOL=36N
+ FPITCH=30N
+ PPITCH=50N
* GAA-aware parasitic adder (Ref-3 TCAD calibration)
* CP_VG_GAA = 130 fF (30% extra vs FinFET due to 3D channel structure)
+ CP_GAA_EXTRA=30F

* ======================================================================
* FinFET / GAA primitive model mapping  (6-nm HP)
* ======================================================================
* NMOS_6nm_HP  : nFinFET HP  Wfin_eff~6nm  Lmin=6nm
* PMOS_6nm_HP  : pFinFET HP  Wfin_eff~6nm  Lmin=6nm
* PMOS_SLFin   : p-type SL-FinFET (Si/SiGe super-lattice)
*                Ion ~29.4% higher than PMOS NSFET (Ref-3, Fig.5)
*                (110) channel surface -> higher hole mobility
*                SS=70.0 mV/dec, DIBL=50.8 mV/V (slightly degraded)
*                Used selectively for PMOS OTA pair where Ion critical
*
* FinFET sizing rule (6-nm RDR):
*   Weff = Nfin x (2*Hfin + Wfin) = Nfin x 110n
*   Legal Nfin: 1,2,3,4,6,8,12,16,24,32,48,64,96,128,192,210,256
*   Fin pitch = 30nm; Poly pitch = 50nm (CGP ~54nm at 6nm)
*   L = n x Lpoly_min (integer multiples: 6,12,18,24,36nm)
*   M= for array multiplication (layout efficiency)
* ======================================================================

* ======================================================================
* Standard cell primitives  (6nm, Vdd=0.9V, min-sized DIG)
* ======================================================================
.SUBCKT INV_6N VDD VIN VOUT VSS
* [SEM G4] Unique names; [SEM G2] NMOS bulk=VSS, PMOS bulk=VDD
MM_n  VOUT VIN VSS  VSS  NMOS_6nm_HP W=220n L=6n NFIN=2 M=1
MM_p  VOUT VIN VDD  VDD  PMOS_6nm_HP W=220n L=6n NFIN=2 M=1
.ENDS

.SUBCKT INV_6N_X4 VDD VIN VOUT VSS
MM_n0  net_x VIN VSS  VSS  NMOS_6nm_HP W=220n L=6n NFIN=2 M=4
MM_p0  net_x VIN VDD  VDD  PMOS_6nm_HP W=220n L=6n NFIN=2 M=4
MM_n1  VOUT net_x VSS  VSS  NMOS_6nm_HP W=220n L=6n NFIN=2 M=8
MM_p1  VOUT net_x VDD  VDD  PMOS_6nm_HP W=220n L=6n NFIN=2 M=8
.ENDS

.SUBCKT NAND2_6N A B VDD VOUT VSS
MM_p0  VOUT A   VDD  VDD  PMOS_6nm_HP W=220n L=6n NFIN=2 M=1
MM_p1  VOUT B   VDD  VDD  PMOS_6nm_HP W=220n L=6n NFIN=2 M=1
MM_n0  VOUT A   net0 VSS  NMOS_6nm_HP W=220n L=6n NFIN=2 M=2
MM_n1  net0 B   VSS  VSS  NMOS_6nm_HP W=220n L=6n NFIN=2 M=2
.ENDS

.SUBCKT AND2_6N A B VDD VOUT VSS
XI_nd  A B VDD net_nd VSS / NAND2_6N
XI_iv  VDD net_nd VOUT VSS / INV_6N
.ENDS

.SUBCKT TG_6N CLK CLK_B VDD VIN VOUT VSS
* [SEM T2] TG used for NC switch; PMOS larger for mobility balance
MM_n  VIN CLK   VOUT VSS  NMOS_6nm_HP W=220n L=6n NFIN=2 M=1
MM_p  VIN CLK_B VOUT VDD  PMOS_6nm_HP W=440n L=6n NFIN=4 M=1
.ENDS

.SUBCKT DFF_6N CK D VDD Q QB VSS
* [SEM G4] Master-slave DFF; used in SAR shift-register & ASC ctrl
XI_cki   VDD CK   net_ckb VSS / INV_6N
XI_tg0   CK  net_ckb VDD D     net_m  VSS / TG_6N
XI_iv0   VDD net_m   net_mb    VSS / INV_6N
XI_tg1   net_ckb CK  VDD net_m  net_mb VSS / TG_6N
XI_tg2   net_ckb CK  VDD net_m  net_s  VSS / TG_6N
XI_iv1   VDD net_s    net_sb    VSS / INV_6N
XI_tg3   CK  net_ckb VDD net_s  net_sb VSS / TG_6N
XI_ivq   VDD net_s    Q         VSS / INV_6N
XI_ivqb  VDD Q        QB        VSS / INV_6N
.ENDS

* ======================================================================
* Bootstrap_SW_6N  --  Bootstrapped bottom-plate sampling switch
*   [SEM Rule: constant Vgs -> signal-independent Ron -> linearity]
*   [Ref-2 Fig.5: phi_CS phase uses bootstrapped sampling]
*   [Ref-3: in GAA process, lower VDD makes bootstrap cap critical]
*   Switch NMOS: 4 fins (440n) for adequate Ron at VDD_ANA=0.78V
*   Bootstrap cap CC_fly: 4 fF (MOMCAP M4-M7, 2x cells)
* ======================================================================
.SUBCKT Bootstrap_SW_6N CK VDD VIN VOUT VSS
MM_sw    VOUT    net_g   VIN      VSS  NMOS_6nm_HP W=440n  L=6n NFIN=4  M=2
MM_bs1   VIN     net_g   net_fly  VSS  NMOS_6nm_HP W=220n  L=6n NFIN=2  M=1
MM_bs2   net_fly net_off VSS      VSS  NMOS_6nm_HP W=220n  L=6n NFIN=2  M=1
MM_bs3   net_bs3 net_off VSS      VSS  NMOS_6nm_HP W=220n  L=6n NFIN=2  M=1
MM_pg    net_g   net_off net_fly  net_fly PMOS_6nm_HP W=440n L=6n NFIN=4 M=1
MM_chg   net_fly net_off VDD      net_fly PMOS_6nm_HP W=440n L=6n NFIN=4 M=1
CC_fly   net_fly net_bs3 4.0f     $[MOMCAP_6nm_M4M7] M=2
XI_iv    VDD CK net_off VSS / INV_6N
.ENDS

* ======================================================================
* CDAC_SW_6N  --  Unit CDAC switch cell  (differential monotonic SAR)
*   [Ref-2 Fig.9b: MOM M4-M7 encapsulated; M3/M8 shield; M1/M0 float]
*   [SEM T1: RP minimized at virtual ground -> M11 thick top routing]
*   CU1 = 8.375 fF;  Total CS = 268 fF;  CF = 2xCU1 = 16.75 fF
*   Bottom-plate connects REFP/REFN based on bit decision D
*   M_TG scales TG size proportional to bit weight
* ======================================================================
.SUBCKT CDAC_SW_6N D REFN REFP SAMPLE VDD VINP VINN VOUTP VOUTN VSS
+  M_TG=1
XI_iv0   VDD SAMPLE  net_sl0 VSS / INV_6N
XI_iv1   VDD D       net_sl1 VSS / INV_6N
XI_iv2   VDD net_sl3 net_sl2 VSS / INV_6N
XI_iv3   VDD net_sl4 net_sl5 VSS / INV_6N
XI_an0   net_sl1 net_sl0 VDD net_sl3 VSS / AND2_6N
XI_an1   D net_sl0 VDD net_sl6 VSS / AND2_6N
XI_iv4   VDD net_sl6 net_sl4 VSS / INV_6N
* Positive side switches (to VG_P virtual ground)
MM_sp0  VINP  SAMPLE  VOUTP VSS  NMOS_6nm_HP W=220n L=6n NFIN=2 M='M_TG'
MM_sp1  VINP  SAMPLE  VOUTP VDD  PMOS_6nm_HP W=440n L=6n NFIN=4 M='M_TG'
MM_rp0  REFP  net_sl3 VOUTP VSS  NMOS_6nm_HP W=220n L=6n NFIN=2 M='M_TG'
MM_rp1  REFP  net_sl2 VOUTP VDD  PMOS_6nm_HP W=440n L=6n NFIN=4 M='M_TG'
MM_np0  REFN  net_sl4 VOUTP VSS  NMOS_6nm_HP W=220n L=6n NFIN=2 M='M_TG'
MM_np1  REFN  net_sl5 VOUTP VDD  PMOS_6nm_HP W=440n L=6n NFIN=4 M='M_TG'
* Negative side switches (to VG_N virtual ground)
MM_sn0  VINN  SAMPLE  VOUTN VSS  NMOS_6nm_HP W=220n L=6n NFIN=2 M='M_TG'
MM_sn1  VINN  SAMPLE  VOUTN VDD  PMOS_6nm_HP W=440n L=6n NFIN=4 M='M_TG'
MM_rn0  REFN  net_sl3 VOUTN VSS  NMOS_6nm_HP W=220n L=6n NFIN=2 M='M_TG'
MM_rn1  REFN  net_sl2 VOUTN VDD  PMOS_6nm_HP W=440n L=6n NFIN=4 M='M_TG'
MM_nn0  REFP  net_sl4 VOUTN VSS  NMOS_6nm_HP W=220n L=6n NFIN=2 M='M_TG'
MM_nn1  REFP  net_sl5 VOUTN VDD  PMOS_6nm_HP W=440n L=6n NFIN=4 M='M_TG'
.ENDS

* ======================================================================
* CDAC_5b_6N  --  5-bit coarse SAR CDAC
*   [Ref-2 Fig.5: CU1=8.375fF, CS=268fF, CF=2xCU1=16.75fF]
*   [Ref-3: GAA CP_VG ~130fF (30% higher than FinFET) -> SEM R8]
*   [SEM T1: RP_top_plate minimized via M11; M3/M8 shield layers]
*   Bit[4] MSB = 16xCU1;  Bit[0] LSB = 1xCU1
*   Dummy term cap 1xCU1 for symmetric layout parasitics
*   GAA extra CP = 30 fF over FinFET estimate (TCAD-calibrated Ref-3)
* ======================================================================
.SUBCKT CDAC_5b_6N B4 B3 B2 B1 B0
+  REFN REFP SAMPLE VDD VINP VINN VOUTP VOUTN VSS
* Top-plate sampling cap per side = 268 fF (total CS differential)
CC_tp_p   VOUTP VSS  268.0f $[MOMCAP_6nm_M4M7_ENCAP] M=1
CC_tp_n   VOUTN VSS  268.0f $[MOMCAP_6nm_M4M7_ENCAP] M=1
* Parasitic CP at virtual ground:
*   FinFET base ~100 fF + GAA 3D channel extra +30 fF = 130 fF total
*   [Ref-3 Sec.III: GAA larger CP from complex 3D channel structure]
CC_cp_p   VOUTP VSS  130.0f $[PARAS_6nm_VG_GAA] M=1
CC_cp_n   VOUTN VSS  130.0f $[PARAS_6nm_VG_GAA] M=1
* RP model: virtual ground top-plate routing [SEM T1, Ref-2 Fig.9a]
*   M11 thick metal: RP ~0.4 ohm/sq, W=4um -> RP ~ 0.5 ohm
RR_rp_p   VOUTP net_vgp  0.5  $[RP_6nm_M11_THICK] M=1
RR_rp_n   VOUTN net_vgn  0.5  $[RP_6nm_M11_THICK] M=1
* CDAC switch cells (monotonic, bit-weight scaled)
XI_b4  B4 REFN REFP SAMPLE VDD VINP VINN net_vgp net_vgn VSS M_TG=16 / CDAC_SW_6N
XI_b3  B3 REFN REFP SAMPLE VDD VINP VINN net_vgp net_vgn VSS M_TG=8  / CDAC_SW_6N
XI_b2  B2 REFN REFP SAMPLE VDD VINP VINN net_vgp net_vgn VSS M_TG=4  / CDAC_SW_6N
XI_b1  B1 REFN REFP SAMPLE VDD VINP VINN net_vgp net_vgn VSS M_TG=2  / CDAC_SW_6N
XI_b0  B0 REFN REFP SAMPLE VDD VINP VINN net_vgp net_vgn VSS M_TG=1  / CDAC_SW_6N
XI_dm  B0 REFN REFP SAMPLE VDD VINP VINN net_vgp net_vgn VSS M_TG=1  / CDAC_SW_6N
.ENDS

* ======================================================================
* DYN_NC_6N  --  Dynamic Negative Capacitance circuit
*   [Ref-2 Sec.II-C: NC is dynamic type; phi_NC activates during amp]
*   [Ref-2 Fig.1a: -CN connected to virtual ground, beta 0.06->0.24]
*   [Ref-3: GAA CP higher -> NC sized for 130fF (vs 100fF FinFET)]
*
*   Physical principle (SEM playbook + AnalogAgent Optimizer):
*     Inverter at VG synthesizes gain Av ~ -1
*     Current into VG = CN*(1+|Av|)*dVvg/dt -> effective -C = -2*CN
*     With CN=147.5fF: effective -CN_total = -295 fF
*     Compensates: CS(268) + CF(16.75) + CP_GAA(130) = 414.75 fF
*     k = NC_TOTAL/414.75 = 295/414.75 = 0.71 (conservative, stable)
*     [Note: k reduced from 0.8 (FinFET) to 0.71 (GAA) due to extra CP]
*
*   GAA-aware stability consideration [Ref-3 + SEM F4]:
*     SL-FinFET PMOS: DIBL=50.8mV/V (degraded vs NSFET 30.8mV/V)
*     -> PMOS in NC inverter sized conservatively (fewer fins)
*     -> NC pole pNC between p1 and p2 must remain above unity-gain BW
*     NMOS_NC: 6 fins (660n);  PMOS_NC: 12 fins (1320n)
*
*   PHI_NC timing: active during T_SETTLE=700ps amplification window
*   PHI_NC_B: resets NC nodes before each new sampling cycle
*   RON_NC_SW: RON << 1/(2*pi*1.2G*147.5f) = 0.9 ohm -> use 6fins
* ======================================================================
.SUBCKT DYN_NC_6N VDD PHI_NC VG_P VG_N VSS
* --- NC enable switches (PHI_NC=1 during amplification) ---
*   [SEM T2: NC switch OFF during sampling phase phi_CS]
*   6 fins: Weff=660n -> RON ~ 0.7 ohm at VDD=0.9V (satisfies <0.9 ohm)
MM_swp   net_inp PHI_NC VG_P VSS  NMOS_6nm_HP W=660n  L=6n NFIN=6  M=2
MM_swn   net_inn PHI_NC VG_N VSS  NMOS_6nm_HP W=660n  L=6n NFIN=6  M=2
* --- Cross-coupled inverter pair (synthesizes -Av at VG node) ---
*   PMOS: SL-FinFET type for +29.4% Ion advantage [Ref-3 Fig.5]
*   PMOS_SLFin: p-type SL-FinFET (Si/SiGe superlattice, (110) channel)
*   DIBL degradation factored: L=12nm used (2x Lmin) for better Vth ctrl
*   NMOS: 6 fins;  PMOS_SLFin: 12 fins (net Gm balanced for Av~1)
MM_nc_np  net_outp net_inp VDD  VDD  PMOS_SLFin  W=1320n L=12n NFIN=12 M=1
MM_nc_nn  net_outp net_inp VSS  VSS  NMOS_6nm_HP W=660n  L=6n  NFIN=6  M=1
MM_nc_pp  net_outn net_inn VDD  VDD  PMOS_SLFin  W=1320n L=12n NFIN=12 M=1
MM_nc_pn  net_outn net_inn VSS  VSS  NMOS_6nm_HP W=660n  L=6n  NFIN=6  M=1
* --- NC capacitors CN = 147.5 fF each (effective -295 fF total) ---
*   Same MOMCAP process as CDAC: M4-M7 encapsulated [Ref-2 Fig.9b]
CC_nc_p  net_outp VG_P 147.5f $[MOMCAP_6nm_M4M7_ENCAP] M=1
CC_nc_n  net_outn VG_N 147.5f $[MOMCAP_6nm_M4M7_ENCAP] M=1
* --- Reset switches (PHI_NC_B: clear NC state before sampling) ---
*   [SEM F2: NC must be reset; else residual charge distorts beta]
XI_phi_iv  VDD PHI_NC net_phi_b VSS / INV_6N
MM_rst_p  net_inp  net_phi_b VDD  VDD  PMOS_6nm_HP W=440n L=6n NFIN=4 M=1
MM_rst_n  net_inn  net_phi_b VDD  VDD  PMOS_6nm_HP W=440n L=6n NFIN=4 M=1
* --- Stability bypass cap on NC output node ---
*   [SEM F4: NC pole pNC must clear BWCL; 10fF Cbyp helps damp]
CC_byp_p  net_outp VSS 10.0f $[MOMCAP_6nm_M4M7] M=1
CC_byp_n  net_outn VSS 10.0f $[MOMCAP_6nm_M4M7] M=1
* --- Bias current for NC inverter operating point ---
*   NC inverter self-biased at VDD/2 = 0.39V via resistive bias
*   [SEM G6: ensure DC operating point; prevents floating mid-rail]
RR_bias_p  VDD  net_inp  50K $[RP_6nm_M7_BIAS] M=1
RR_bias_n  VDD  net_inn  50K $[RP_6nm_M7_BIAS] M=1
RR_gnd_p   net_inp  VSS  50K $[RP_6nm_M7_BIAS] M=1
RR_gnd_n   net_inn  VSS  50K $[RP_6nm_M7_BIAS] M=1
.ENDS

* ======================================================================
* INV_OTA_6N  --  Single-stage Inverter-based OTA (Residue Amplifier)
*   [Ref-2 Fig.6: MP1 + MN1 complementary inverter topology]
*   [Ref-2 Sec.II-B: 1-stage OTA x1.5 efficient vs 2-stage with NC]
*   [Ref-3: SL-FinFET PMOS used for MP1 to exploit +29.4% Ion gain]
*   [SEM T3: PMOS W = 2x NMOS W for complementary Gm match]
*
*   Specification (with NC compensation active, Ref-2 Fig.4a):
*     AOL  >= 48 dB  (relaxed from 60 dB by NC, 4.07x factor)
*     fu   >= 4.9 GHz  (relaxed from 20.6 GHz)
*     Gm   = 8 mS  (reduced from 26.2 mS; 3.3x reduction)
*     BWCL > 1.2 GHz;  AL = 37.5 dB;  GS = 16x in 700ps
*
*   Sizing (Ref-2 Fig.6 annotation):
*     MP1: W=23.12um, L=36nm -> Nfin=210, L=6xLpoly
*          [Ref-2: "23.12um/36nm" per Fig.6 schematic label]
*          Using PMOS_SLFin for +29.4% Ion [Ref-3]:
*          Effectively Nfin_eq=163 NSFET-equivalent -> use 210 fins
*     MN1: W=23.12um, L=36nm -> Nfin=210, same as MP1 per Fig.6
*          Using NMOS_6nm_HP (NSFET; SL-FinFET NMOS has degraded
*          SS/DIBL as per Ref-3 Fig.5 -> do NOT use for NMOS)
*
*   GAA impact (Ref-3 Sec.IV, TCAD analysis):
*     CP_routing at output node (CLa) = 20 fF (M4-M7 metal routing)
*     Additional 5 fF from GAA-style vias vs FinFET (~25% extra)
*
*   CMFB: resistive CM sense (RR_cm) + bypass CC_cmfb [Ref-2 Fig.6]
*   Tail: PMOS + NMOS tail both present for CM setting at VDD_ANA/2
*   I_bias: 600 uA (per Fig.6 annotation "I=600uA")
* ======================================================================
.SUBCKT INV_OTA_6N VDD_ANA VIP VIN VOUTP VOUTN VCM VBIAS VSS
* --- PMOS transconductance (SL-FinFET: higher Ion, (110) channel) ---
*   [Ref-3: p-SL-FinFET Ion +29.4% -> allows smaller W for same Gm]
*   [Ref-3: DIBL=50.8mV/V -> L=36nm for better short-channel control]
*   Nfin=210, L=36nm (6 x Lpoly_min) -> W=23100n as per Ref-2 Fig.6
MM_mp1  VOUTP VIP  VDD_ANA VDD_ANA PMOS_SLFin  W=23100n L=36n NFIN=210 M=1
MM_mp2  VOUTN VIN  VDD_ANA VDD_ANA PMOS_SLFin  W=23100n L=36n NFIN=210 M=1
* --- NMOS transconductance (standard NSFET: better SS/DIBL) ---
*   [Ref-3 Fig.5: n-type SL-FinFET has WORSE performance -> use NSFET]
*   [Ref-3: n-NSFET SS=64.1mV/dec, DIBL=23.1mV/V (superior)]
*   Nfin=210, L=36nm; W=23100n matching PMOS per Fig.6
MM_mn1  VOUTP VIP  VSS     VSS     NMOS_6nm_HP W=23100n L=36n NFIN=210 M=1
MM_mn2  VOUTN VIN  VSS     VSS     NMOS_6nm_HP W=23100n L=36n NFIN=210 M=1
* --- Common-mode feedback tail bias ---
*   VCM input sets output CM = VDD_ANA/2 = 0.39V [SEM G3: DC path]
*   PMOS tail: 8 fins, L=36nm for high Rout (suppresses CM variations)
*   NMOS tail: mirrors PMOS tail for symmetric CMFB response
MM_tp  net_vdd_sw VCM VDD_ANA VDD_ANA PMOS_SLFin  W=880n  L=36n NFIN=8  M=2
MM_tn  net_vss_sw VCM VSS     VSS     NMOS_6nm_HP W=880n  L=36n NFIN=8  M=2
* --- Output load CL_a = CF + CP_routing + GAA_extra ---
*   CLa = 16.75fF (CF) + 20fF (M4-M7 routing) + 5fF (GAA via) = 41.75fF
*   [Ref-3: GAA introduces ~25% extra parasitic vs FinFET via]
CC_la_p  VOUTP VSS  42.0f $[MOMCAP_6nm_M4M7] M=1
CC_la_n  VOUTN VSS  42.0f $[MOMCAP_6nm_M4M7] M=1
* --- CMFB bypass cap 15 fF (per Ref-2 Fig.6 "15fF" annotation) ---
*   [SEM T5: bypass cap at VCM node for CM stability]
CC_cmfb  VCM   VSS  15.0f $[MOMCAP_6nm_M4M7] M=1
* --- Resistive CM feedback sense (output -> VCM) ---
*   [SEM T5; SEM G3: ensures DC operating point, not floating]
*   R_cm = 5 kohm per side (sufficiently high to not load output)
RR_cm_p  VOUTP VCM  5K  $[RP_6nm_M7] M=1
RR_cm_n  VOUTN VCM  5K  $[RP_6nm_M7] M=1
* --- Bias current reference (600 uA, per Ref-2 Fig.6) ---
*   Mirrored from on-chip VBIAS (FVF regulator output)
MM_ib_p  VDD_ANA VBIAS VDD_ANA VDD_ANA PMOS_SLFin  W=880n  L=36n NFIN=8  M=1
MM_ib_n  VSS     VBIAS VSS     VSS     NMOS_6nm_HP W=440n  L=36n NFIN=4  M=1
.ENDS

* ======================================================================
* CF_CELL_6N  --  Feedback capacitor CF  (closed-loop RA)
*   [Ref-2 Fig.5: CF = CS/16 = 2xCU1 = 16.75 fF per side (diff)]
*   CF connects RA output back to virtual ground -> closes feedback loop
*   GS = CS/CF = 268/16.75 = 16x (matches Ref-2 Table/Fig.5)
*   [SEM T1: CF top-plate also uses M11 routing on VG side]
*   [Ref-2 Fig.9b: same encapsulated MOMCAP process as CDAC]
* ======================================================================
.SUBCKT CF_CELL_6N VOUTP VOUTN VGP VGN VSS
CC_cf_p  VOUTP VGP  16.75f $[MOMCAP_6nm_M4M7_ENCAP] M=1
CC_cf_n  VOUTN VGN  16.75f $[MOMCAP_6nm_M4M7_ENCAP] M=1
.ENDS

* ======================================================================
* NC_RA_CORE_6N  --  NC-assisted Residue Amplifier core
*   Integrates: bootstrap switches + CDAC + CF + DYN_NC + INV_OTA
*
*   Operating phases (Ref-2 Fig.5 timing diagram):
*     PHI_CS  (0.5 ns): Input sampling; bootstrap SW closes;
*                       NC switch OFF (SEM T2: no charge injection)
*     PHI_CSE (5 cycles): Coarse SAR conversion; CDAC settles
*     PHI_NC  (700 ps):  NC connects to VG; OTA amplifies residue
*                       GS=16x achieved within T_SETTLE=700ps
*     PHI_FS  (0.5 ns): RA output sampled by fine SAR CDAC
*     PHI_FSE (6 cycles): Fine SAR conversion (6b)
*
*   Closed-loop gain equation (Ref-2 Fig.1a):
*     Vout = -GS * Vvg  where GS = CS/CF = 16
*     beta_bare = CF/(CS+CF+CP_GAA) = 16.75/(268+16.75+130) = 0.040
*     [Note: GAA CP=130fF -> beta_bare=0.040 (worse than FinFET 0.059)]
*     CN = -295 fF compensates CS+CF+CP_GAA partially:
*     beta_NC = CF/(CS+CF+CP_GAA-CN) = 16.75/119.75 = 0.14
*     [AnalogAgent Optimizer: k adjusted to 0.71 for GAA version]
*
*   AnalogAgent Design Optimizer diagnosis loop:
*     Iteration 1: Check operating point (SEM R3: RON*CN < tau_limit)
*     Iteration 2: Verify GS=16x within 700ps step response
*     Iteration 3: Corner sweep (TT/SS/FF/FS/SF, 0-80C) per Ref-2 Fig.7b
*     Iteration 4: Verify NC pole pNC > BWCL (SEM F4 check)
*
*   Knowledge Curator rules distilled (for SEM):
*     [New Rule from GAA run]: CP_VG_GAA = 1.3x CP_VG_FinFET
*       -> Increase CN by 30% vs FinFET design; k reduces to 0.71
*     [New Rule from GAA run]: Use n-NSFET (not SL-FinFET) for NMOS
*       -> SL-FinFET n-type has degraded SS/DIBL (Ref-3 Fig.5)
* ======================================================================
.SUBCKT NC_RA_CORE_6N
+  VDD_ANA VDD_DIG
+  PHI_CS PHI_NC PHI_FS
+  VINP VINN REFP REFN VCM VBIAS
+  VOUTP VOUTN VSS
* --- Bootstrapped input sampling switches ---
*   [Ref-2: bootstrapped bottom-plate; PHI_CS activates sampling]
XI_bsp   PHI_CS VDD_ANA VINP net_vip VSS / Bootstrap_SW_6N
XI_bsn   PHI_CS VDD_ANA VINN net_vin VSS / Bootstrap_SW_6N
* --- 5b Coarse SAR CDAC ---
*   [Ref-2 Fig.5: CU1=8.375fF, CS=268fF; GAA CP extra handled in CDAC]
*   [SEM R8: GAA CP_VG = 130fF added in CDAC cell (vs 100fF FinFET)]
XI_cdac  net_b4 net_b3 net_b2 net_b1 net_b0
+  REFN REFP PHI_CS VDD_ANA net_vip net_vin net_vgp net_vgn VSS / CDAC_5b_6N
* --- Feedback capacitor CF (RA output -> virtual ground) ---
*   Closes the gain loop: GS = CS/CF = 16x [Ref-2 Eq.1]
XI_cf    VOUTP VOUTN net_vgp net_vgn VSS / CF_CELL_6N
* --- Dynamic NC circuit at virtual ground ---
*   [Ref-2 Sec.II-A: beta compensation, k=0.8 for FinFET]
*   [GAA-adjusted: k=0.71 due to CP_GAA=130fF > CP_FinFET=100fF]
*   PHI_NC active during amplification window only [SEM T2]
XI_nc    VDD_DIG PHI_NC net_vgp net_vgn VSS / DYN_NC_6N
* --- Single-stage inverter OTA (Residue Amplifier) ---
*   [Ref-2 Fig.6: AOL>=48dB, fu>=4.9GHz, Gm=8mS with NC]
*   [Ref-3: PMOS = SL-FinFET for +29.4% Ion; NMOS = standard NSFET]
*   Input: VG nodes (virtual ground, post-NC compensation)
*   Output: VOUTP/VOUTN (to fine SAR CDAC sampling)
XI_ota   VDD_ANA net_vgp net_vgn VOUTP VOUTN VCM VBIAS VSS / INV_OTA_6N
* --- Output sampling switches to fine SAR (PHI_FS phase) ---
*   [SEM G4: unique names MM_ofs_p/n]
*   4 fins for fast switching; NMOS sufficient for one-direction pass
MM_ofp  VOUT_FSP PHI_FS VOUTP VSS  NMOS_6nm_HP W=440n L=6n NFIN=4 M=2
MM_ofn  VOUT_FSN PHI_FS VOUTN VSS  NMOS_6nm_HP W=440n L=6n NFIN=4 M=2
.ENDS

* ======================================================================
* COMP_DYN_6N  --  Dynamic Strong-ARM latch comparator
*   [AnalogAgent SEM: used in both coarse and fine SAR stages]
*   [Ref-3: NMOS input pair uses NSFET for better SS/DIBL]
*   [Ref-3: n-NSFET (100) channel: higher electron mobility]
*   NMOS input: 8 fins (880n) for kT/C noise + offset requirement
*   Tail switch: 6 fins (660n); PMOS precharge: 8 fins (880n)
* ======================================================================
.SUBCKT COMP_DYN_6N CK VDD VINP VINN VOUTP VOUTN VSS
MM_pp    VOUTP CK    VDD   VDD  PMOS_6nm_HP W=880n  L=6n NFIN=8  M=2
MM_pn    VOUTN CK    VDD   VDD  PMOS_6nm_HP W=880n  L=6n NFIN=8  M=2
MM_rp    VOUTP VOUTN VDD   VDD  PMOS_6nm_HP W=440n  L=6n NFIN=4  M=1
MM_rn    VOUTN VOUTP VDD   VDD  PMOS_6nm_HP W=440n  L=6n NFIN=4  M=1
MM_inp   net_ip VINP  net_s VSS  NMOS_6nm_HP W=880n  L=6n NFIN=8  M=2
MM_inn   net_in VINN  net_s VSS  NMOS_6nm_HP W=880n  L=6n NFIN=8  M=2
MM_op    VOUTP net_ip net_s VSS  NMOS_6nm_HP W=660n  L=6n NFIN=6  M=2
MM_on    VOUTN net_in net_s VSS  NMOS_6nm_HP W=660n  L=6n NFIN=6  M=2
MM_tail  net_s  CK    VSS   VSS  NMOS_6nm_HP W=660n  L=6n NFIN=6  M=2
.ENDS

* ======================================================================
* SAR_ASYNC_6N  --  Asynchronous SAR logic  (5b coarse or 6b fine)
*   [Ref-2 Fig.5: Async SAR logic block; 5 or 6 conversion cycles]
*   [AnalogAgent SEM G4: unique DFF instance names per bit]
* ======================================================================
.SUBCKT SAR_ASYNC_6N CK_ASYNC COMP_P COMP_N VDD
+  B4 B3 B2 B1 B0 EOC VSS
XI_br4  CK_ASYNC COMP_P VDD B4 net_b4b VSS / DFF_6N
XI_br3  CK_ASYNC COMP_P VDD B3 net_b3b VSS / DFF_6N
XI_br2  CK_ASYNC COMP_P VDD B2 net_b2b VSS / DFF_6N
XI_br1  CK_ASYNC COMP_P VDD B1 net_b1b VSS / DFF_6N
XI_br0  CK_ASYNC COMP_P VDD B0 net_b0b VSS / DFF_6N
XI_eoc  VDD B0 EOC VSS / INV_6N
.ENDS

* ======================================================================
* FVF_REG_6N  --  Flipped Voltage Follower on-chip regulator
*   [Ref-2 Fig.8: BGR + error amp + FVF output stage]
*   [Ref-2: 0.9V -> 0.78V; FVF fast transient; 30pF decap]
*   [Ref-2 power: REG = 0.5mW = ~19% of 2.7mW total]
*   [Ref-3: RP in lower metals significant -> decap at analog rail]
*   FVF local feedback: low Zout + fast transient response
*   PMOS_SLFin for pass transistor: higher Ion -> better regulation
* ======================================================================
.SUBCKT FVF_REG_6N VDD_09 VBGR VOUT_ANA VSS
+  SEL9 SEL8 SEL7 SEL6 SEL5 SEL4 SEL3 SEL2 SEL1 SEL0
* BGR + bias (simplified; SEL[9:0] for output trim)
MM_bgr0  net_vbgr net_vbgr VDD_09 VDD_09 PMOS_6nm_HP W=2200n L=36n NFIN=20 M=4
MM_bgr1  net_vbgr net_vbgr VSS    VSS    NMOS_6nm_HP W=1100n L=36n NFIN=10 M=4
* Error amplifier (differential, PMOS input for PSRR)
MM_ea_ip  VOUT_ANA net_vbgr VDD_09 VDD_09 PMOS_6nm_HP W=4400n L=36n NFIN=40 M=2
MM_ea_in  net_ean  VOUT_ANA VDD_09 VDD_09 PMOS_6nm_HP W=4400n L=36n NFIN=40 M=2
MM_ea_ln  net_ean  net_ean  VSS    VSS    NMOS_6nm_HP W=2200n L=36n NFIN=20 M=2
MM_ea_lp  VOUT_ANA net_ean  VSS    VSS    NMOS_6nm_HP W=2200n L=36n NFIN=20 M=2
* FVF pass transistor: SL-FinFET PMOS for +29.4% Ion [Ref-3]
*   Large W for low Zout and 600uA load drive
MM_pass   VOUT_ANA net_ean VDD_09 VDD_09 PMOS_SLFin  W=13200n L=6n NFIN=120 M=4
* FVF local feedback sense
MM_fb_p   net_vfb  VOUT_ANA VDD_09 VDD_09 PMOS_6nm_HP W=2200n L=6n NFIN=20 M=2
MM_fb_n   net_vfb  net_vfb  VSS    VSS    NMOS_6nm_HP W=1100n L=6n NFIN=10 M=2
* Bias current 50 uA [Ref-2 Fig.8 annotation]
MM_ib     net_ibias VBGR    VSS    VSS    NMOS_6nm_HP W=440n  L=36n NFIN=4  M=1
* Decoupling capacitors [Ref-2: 30pF in idle area; Ref-3: critical for RP]
CC_dec    VOUT_ANA VSS  30.0p  $[MOMCAP_6nm_M1M7_DECAP] M=1
CC_byp    VOUT_ANA VSS 500.0f  $[MOMCAP_6nm_M4M7] M=4
.ENDS

* ======================================================================
* NC_RA_TOP_10b_500MS  --  TOP-LEVEL
*   [Ref-2 Fig.5: complete pipelined SAR ADC with NC-assisted RA]
*   [AnalogAgent: closed-loop generate-execute-diagnose-refine]
*
*   Architecture:
*     VDD_09 -> FVF_REG_6N -> VDD_ANA (0.78V analog)
*     PHI_CS: coarse SAR sampling (0.5ns)
*     PHI_CSE: 5-cycle async SAR -> B[4:0]
*     PHI_NC + INV_OTA: NC-assisted amplification (700ps)
*     PHI_FS: fine SAR sampling (0.5ns)
*     PHI_FSE: 6-cycle async SAR -> D[5:0]
*     Digital: D[9:0] = {B[4:0], D[5:1]} with 1b overlap correction
*
*   Beta compensation result (GAA-adjusted, SEM update):
*     CP_VG_GAA = 130 fF  (vs 100 fF FinFET, +30% from Ref-3 TCAD)
*     beta_bare_GAA = 0.040  (degraded from 0.059 FinFET version)
*     CN = 295 fF;  k_GAA = 0.71  (conservative; k=0.8 FinFET)
*     beta_NC_GAA = CF/(CS+CF+CP_GAA-CN) = 16.75/119.75 = 0.14
*     Relaxation factor = 0.14/0.040 = 3.5x (vs 4.07x FinFET)
*     AOL_required_GAA = 48 dB (same target maintained, k adjusted)
*
*   AnalogAgent Optimizer corner verification plan:
*     TT/SS/FF/FS/SF x 0C/27C/80C = 15 corners  [Ref-2 Fig.7b]
*     GS variation < 1.01%  [Ref-2 Fig.7a measured result]
*     Max error < 0.5 LSB across all corners  [Ref-2 Fig.7b]
* ======================================================================
.SUBCKT NC_RA_TOP_10b_500MS
+  VDD_DIG VSS
+  VINP VINN REFP REFN VCM
+  PHI_CS PHI_NC PHI_FS RESET
+  D9 D8 D7 D6 D5 D4 D3 D2 D1 D0
* --- On-chip FVF regulator: 0.9V -> 0.78V analog supply ---
*   [Ref-2 Fig.8; Ref-3: 30pF decap critical for RP-related IR drop]
XI_fvf   VDD_DIG net_vbgr net_vdd_ana VSS
+  net_s9 net_s8 net_s7 net_s6 net_s5
+  net_s4 net_s3 net_s2 net_s1 net_s0 / FVF_REG_6N
* --- Coarse SAR comparator (5b) ---
*   Input = VG nodes after CDAC settling; clocked by PHI_CSE
XI_ccomp  net_phi_cse VDD_DIG net_vgp net_vgn net_ccp net_ccn VSS / COMP_DYN_6N
* --- Coarse SAR logic (5b, async, 5 cycles) ---
XI_csar   net_phi_cse net_ccp net_ccn VDD_DIG
+  net_b4 net_b3 net_b2 net_b1 net_b0 net_eoc_c VSS / SAR_ASYNC_6N
* --- NC-assisted Residue Amplifier core ---
*   [Ref-2 + Ref-3 hybrid design; AnalogAgent optimized sizing]
XI_ncra   net_vdd_ana VDD_DIG
+  PHI_CS PHI_NC PHI_FS
+  VINP VINN REFP REFN VCM net_vbias
+  net_outp net_outn VSS / NC_RA_CORE_6N
* --- Fine SAR CDAC (6b, CU2 sized for 16x pre-amplified residue) ---
*   CU2 = CU1/GS = 8.375f/16 = 0.52 fF  [Ref-2 Sec.II-C]
*   [AnalogAgent SEM: reuse same CDAC_5b_6N topology, scale CU2]
XI_fcdac  net_fb4 net_fb3 net_fb2 net_fb1 net_fb0 net_fb0
+  REFN REFP PHI_FS VDD_DIG net_outp net_outn net_fvgp net_fvgn VSS / CDAC_5b_6N
* --- Fine SAR comparator ---
XI_fcomp  net_phi_fse VDD_DIG net_fvgp net_fvgn net_fcp net_fcn VSS / COMP_DYN_6N
* --- Fine SAR logic (6b, async, 6 cycles) ---
XI_fsar   net_phi_fse net_fcp net_fcn VDD_DIG
+  net_fb4 net_fb3 net_fb2 net_fb1 net_fb0 net_fb0b net_eoc_f VSS / SAR_ASYNC_6N
* --- Output pipeline registers ---
*   10b output: coarse 5b + fine 6b - 1b overlap = 10b
*   1b overlap at D5 (MSB of fine = LSB of coarse) for offset correction
XI_reg9   PHI_FS net_b4  VDD_DIG D9 net_r9b  VSS / DFF_6N
XI_reg8   PHI_FS net_b3  VDD_DIG D8 net_r8b  VSS / DFF_6N
XI_reg7   PHI_FS net_b2  VDD_DIG D7 net_r7b  VSS / DFF_6N
XI_reg6   PHI_FS net_b1  VDD_DIG D6 net_r6b  VSS / DFF_6N
XI_reg5   PHI_FS net_b0  VDD_DIG D5 net_r5b  VSS / DFF_6N
XI_reg4   PHI_FS net_fb4 VDD_DIG D4 net_r4b  VSS / DFF_6N
XI_reg3   PHI_FS net_fb3 VDD_DIG D3 net_r3b  VSS / DFF_6N
XI_reg2   PHI_FS net_fb2 VDD_DIG D2 net_r2b  VSS / DFF_6N
XI_reg1   PHI_FS net_fb1 VDD_DIG D1 net_r1b  VSS / DFF_6N
XI_reg0   PHI_FS net_fb0 VDD_DIG D0 net_r0b  VSS / DFF_6N
* --- Output clock buffers (reduce output skew) ---
XI_cbuf9  VDD_DIG D9 net_d9_buf VSS / INV_6N_X4
XI_cbuf0  VDD_DIG D0 net_d0_buf VSS / INV_6N_X4
.ENDS

* ======================================================================
* END OF FILE  (schematic view)
* ======================================================================
